scope: Chinese Taipei (Taiwan) projects with a digital element in the OECD CRS, 2023-2024

projects.project: Health Information Management Efficiency Enhancement Project (Paraguay)
projects.implementing_partners: TaiwanICDF; Cathay General Hospital; Paraguay Ministry of Public Health & Social Welfare; Paraguay Ministry of ICT
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. A national health information system (HIS) replacing handwritten hospital records.
projects.key_facts: The HIS is now in 1,000 public healthcare facilities, covering health data for over 70% of Paraguay's population; the goal is all 1,592 public medical institutions.
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page (Phase 2): https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31549&mp=2&xItem=58289 | TaiwanICDF project page (Phase 1): https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31765&mp=2&xItem=33764 | ICDF news: HIS now in 1,000 public hospitals: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31572&mp=2&xItem=73589

links.label: ICDF news: HIS now in 1,000 public hospitals

projects.project: Enhancing Public Safety with Intelligent Video Analytics (St. Vincent & the Grenadines)
projects.implementing_partners: Taiwan Technical Mission in SVG; SVG IT Services Division; Royal St. Vincent & the Grenadines Police Force
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. A nationwide smart video-surveillance and analytics system for public safety.
projects.key_facts: 300+ cameras at 20+ locations incl. Union Island and Bequia; AI licence-plate recognition; a centralised video-sharing platform; cybersecurity training for 200+ Vincentians. Investigation time in covered areas cut by ~50%.
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31539&mp=2&xItem=69786 | Searchlight (SVG): 300+ cameras installed: https://www.searchlight.vc/news/2025/08/14/police-receive-bucket-truck-taiwan-funded-video-analytics-project/

projects.project: Flood Warning Capacity Improvement for the Belize River Basin
projects.implementing_partners: TaiwanICDF; National Taiwan University; Belize Ministry of Sustainable Development, Climate Change & DRM; NEMO; National Met & Hydrological Services
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. A hydrological-sensor flood early-warning system for the Belize River Basin.
projects.key_facts: Five hydrological monitoring stations; flood-potential maps for Belmopan, San Ignacio and Belize City. San Ignacio — previously with no alert mechanism — can now receive flood warnings up to three hours in advance.
projects.more_links: ICDF news: NTU flood-warning project concludes: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31572&mp=2&xItem=74183 | Govt of Belize: disaster-management training: https://www.pressoffice.gov.bz/ministry-of-sustainable-development-and-taiwanicdf-host-closing-ceremony-for-disaster-management-training/

links.label: ICDF news: NTU flood-warning project concludes

projects.project: Health Information Management Efficiency Enhancement Project (Somaliland)
projects.implementing_partners: TaiwanICDF; Somaliland Ministry of Health Development; Kaohsiung Medical University Chung-Ho Memorial Hospital
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. An integrated hospital health information system (SHIS) with electronic medical records.
projects.key_facts: SHIS deployed at 6 hospitals; 394,374 electronic medical records accumulated; 60 training sessions / 1,497 participants; automated daily uploads to the Ministry's central server.
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31549&mp=2&xItem=68951 | Somaliland Chronicle: HIS launched at Hargeisa: https://somalilandchronicle.com/2023/03/29/the-first-somaliland-health-information-system-at-hargeisa-group-hospital-launched/

links.label: Somaliland Chronicle: HIS launched at Hargeisa

projects.project: Application of ICT in Digital Capacity Building Project (Saint Lucia)
projects.implementing_partners: TaiwanICDF; St. Lucia Ministry of Public Service; Ministry of Education; Taiwan Technical Mission
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. Builds national ICT-training capacity and Digital Development Centres.
projects.key_facts: Converting government buildings (Laborie, then Gros Islet, Dennery, Soufrière) into Digital Development Centres; target +54% training capacity (up to 1,440 trainees/year). Total value US$2.01M (Taiwan US$1.52M + St. Lucia US$0.49M).
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31539&mp=2&xItem=70201 | The Voice (St. Lucia): project launched: https://thevoiceslu.com/2023/10/taiwan-saint-lucia-sponsored-ict-capacity-building-project-launched/

projects.project: Early Warning and Disaster Management System Project (Guatemala)
projects.implementing_partners: TaiwanICDF; Guatemala CONRED; National Taiwan University civil-engineering team; Taiwan Investment & Trade Mission in Central America
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. An IoT-sensor flood early-warning and disaster-management system. The CRS line shown is the preparatory tranche.
projects.key_facts: Three IoT monitoring stations in the Cahabón river basin; a flood-simulation model (50/150/300mm scenarios); a disaster risk map; 4 community response plans; targeting a 30% reduction in response time.

projects.project: Strengthening Coastal Fisheries Resource Management Project (Palau)
projects.implementing_partners: Taiwan Technical Mission in Palau; Palau Ministry of Agriculture, Fisheries & Environment / Bureau of Fisheries
projects.digital_component: Digital component. Procures an information-integration platform to digitise fisheries-resource data management.
projects.key_facts: Coastal catch-reporting points and an information-integration platform; target of 80% of catch across Palau's three states under the new monitoring mechanism. Aligned to SDG 14.
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31665&mp=2&xItem=71819 | ICDF news: Taiwan–Palau blue economy: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?xItem=72093&ctNode=31572&mp=2

projects.implementing_partners: TaiwanICDF; Somaliland Ministry of ICT; Taiwan Technical Mission
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. Built the 'S-Road' intra-government data-exchange platform and a government portal.
projects.key_facts: Deployed the 'S-Road' data-exchange system and a government portal; 52 ICT training programmes for 1,096+ participants; supports the Somaliland e-Government Strategy 2020-2024 Action Plan.
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?xItem=62522&ctNode=31626&mp=2 | Somaliland Reporter: digital-transformation phase II: https://somalilandreporter.com/2024/05/24/taiwans-to-boost-somalilands-digital-transformation-in-phase-ii-partnership/

projects.project: Strengthening Digital Healthcare for NCDs and COVID-19 in Fiji
projects.implementing_partners: TaiwanICDF; USAID; Fiji Ministry of Health & Medical Services; National Taiwan University Hospital Hsin-Chu Branch
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. Built the 'Sova Ni Bula' app, replacing paper records with digital case management for NCD, COVID-19 and long-COVID patient tracking.
projects.key_facts: 9,000+ patient records digitised; 4,100+ clinical consultations supported; 88 healthcare professionals trained. TaiwanICDF's first public-health project in Fiji.
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31680&mp=2&xItem=72267 | ICDF news: ICDF–USAID–Fiji MHMS app: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31572&mp=2&xItem=72053 | Islands Business: Taiwan–Fiji digital health: https://islandsbusiness.com/partner-advertorials/building-a-more-resilient-pacific-taiwan-and-fijis-partnership-in-digital-health-and-medical-capacity/

projects.implementing_partners: Taiwan Technical Mission in Thailand; Royal Project Foundation (RPF), Chiang Mai
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. Introduces sensing, decision and environmental-control (IoT) systems for precision agriculture at RPF stations.
projects.key_facts: 10 smart-agriculture demonstration sites; block-program modules for 4 target crops; 146+ RPF personnel trained (to Mar 2026). Targets: +10% yield, −15% pesticide use.
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?xItem=70877&ctNode=31677&mp=2 | ICDF quarterly: 'When AI Enters the Fields': https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31929&mp=1&xItem=74033 | ICDF news: 5th RPF cooperation MOU: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31572&mp=2&xItem=70632

links.label: ICDF quarterly: 'When AI Enters the Fields'

projects.project: Strengthening Medical Imaging System in Belize
projects.implementing_partners: TaiwanICDF; Far Eastern Memorial Hospital (Taiwan); Belize Ministry of Health & Wellness
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. Strengthens digital medical-imaging services with software, equipment and IT-personnel training.
projects.key_facts: Digital imaging at Karl Heusner Memorial Hospital plus Western, Northern (later Southern) regional hospitals; trained two Belizean radiologists via a three-year Taiwan residency.
projects.more_links: ICDF news: Far Eastern Memorial Hospital partnership: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31572&mp=2&xItem=57351 | ICDF news: training Belize's first radiologists: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?xItem=69307&ctNode=31572&mp=2 | Govt of Belize: imaging project concluded: https://www.pressoffice.gov.bz/mohw-and-taiwan-sign-public-health-projects-agreement/

links.label: ICDF news: Far Eastern Memorial Hospital partnership
ICDF news: training Belize's first radiologists
Govt of Belize: imaging project concluded

projects.project: Hospital Health Information Management Efficiency Enhancement Project (Honduras)
projects.implementing_partners: Taiwan Technical Mission in Honduras; Taipei Municipal Wanfang Hospital; Honduras Secretaría de Salud
projects.digital_component: Digital-led. Developed a hospital health information system for two public hospitals.
projects.key_facts: HIS for Puerto Cortés and Gabriela Alvarado (Danlí) hospitals; trained doctors and IT staff. No TaiwanICDF page survives — Honduras switched diplomatic recognition to the PRC in March 2023, after which ICDF wound down; documented here via the Honduran press.
projects.more_links: El Heraldo (Honduras): Taiwan trains hospital staff: https://www.elheraldo.hn/honduras/gestion-hospitales-capacitacion-taiwan-honduras-HQEH1496735

links.label: El Heraldo (Honduras): Taiwan trains hospital staff

projects.project: Maternal and Infant Health Care Improvement Project (Eswatini, Phase 2)
projects.implementing_partners: Chiayi Christian Hospital; Hualien Tzu Chi Hospital; Eswatini Ministry of Health; Swaziland Nazarene Health Institution
projects.digital_component: Digital thread. A conventional maternal-health project; the digital element is strengthening health-data analysis capacity.
projects.key_facts: Scaled to ~85 health facilities nationwide; E9.5M of medical equipment donated. Postnatal-care coverage within 7–14 days in target areas reported rising from 22% (2016) to 90% (2019).
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31623&mp=2&xItem=53647 | Eswatini Independent News: E9.5M equipment: https://independentnews.co.sz/7433/news/taiwan-donates-e9-5-million-worth-of-medical-equipment-towards-maternal-health-care/

projects.project: Technical and Vocational Skills Certification Enhancement Project (Eswatini)
projects.implementing_partners: Taiwan Technical Mission in Eswatini; Eswatini Ministry of Labour & Social Security; Ministry of Education & Training
projects.digital_component: Digital thread. A skills-certification (TVET) project; the digital element is ICT labs and an upgraded certification information system.
projects.key_facts: High-Demand trade test for 1,138 people; 44 upskilling classes with 606 graduates (to June 2025). Beneficiary institutions ECOT and Gwamile VOCTIM received upgraded electrical-engineering and ICT labs.
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31623&mp=2&xItem=63477 | Eswatini DIVT: TVET projects: https://www.divt.org.sz/tvet-projects/

projects.project: Expanding High-Quality Rice Seed Production in South Sulawesi (Indonesia)
projects.implementing_partners: Taiwan Technical Mission in Indonesia; Hasanuddin University (UNHAS); Indonesian Cereals Research Institute (ICERI); IRRI
projects.digital_component: Digital thread. Primarily a rice-seed agronomy project; the digital element is meteorological stations and climate-monitoring technology.
projects.key_facts: ~400 ha of rice-farming promotion, training workshops, meteorological stations. Extension of a phase-1 project that aimed to make UNHAS a certified-seed technology centre.
projects.more_links: TaiwanICDF project page: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?xItem=63091&ctNode=31668&mp=2 | ICDF news: phase-1 launch: https://www.icdf.org.tw/wSite/ct?ctNode=31572&mp=2&xItem=44606
